ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiences" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the experience */,
  "experience_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experience type (academic or professional) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the experience was gained */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position held during the experience */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities or duties performed during the experience */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experience was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experience was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiences_experience_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_type_id") REFERENCES experience_types ("experience_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiences_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiences_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution (city, country) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Path to the institution's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experience the document supports */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_experience_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_id") REFERENCES experiences ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_types" (
  "experience_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience type */,
  "experience_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experience type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experience type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experience where the skill was acquired */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_experience_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_id") REFERENCES experiences ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experience where the achievement was gained */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_experience_id FOREIGN KEY ("experience_id") REFERENCES experiences ("experience_id")
)
